message:
feat: reasoning_effort on spawn_agent + stuck escalation

1. spawn_agent now accepts reasoning_effort parameter (low/medium/high/
   xhigh) so the coordinator can allocate more reasoning to hard tasks.

2. Loop detection now escalates instead of just warning:
   - First detection: bumps reasoning effort (e.g. default→high, high→xhigh)
     and asks "what assumption might be wrong?"
   - Second detection: tells agent to abandon current approach entirely
   - Third+: tells agent to report what it tried and what failed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
